title: derris malaccensis
intro: Derris malaccensis, also known as the Malayan derris, is a climbing vine plant species in the pea family that is native to Southeast Asia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain rotenone, a natural insecticide that has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Derris malaccensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. The plant is often prepared in herbal form through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
